name: djungle-agent-os
description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.6.0: writeback automatico — le sessioni si chiudono e digeriscono da sole (Trigger B su /invoke + idle-sweep), fact HIGH auto in SOTA, MEDIUM in /review-queue. v4.5.0: Scribe autonomo (Session Digestion). v4.4.x: user-aware auth, Personal API Key, switch tenant. v4.3.x: multi-tenant + brand emoji. v4.2.x: Librarian. v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace. Backed da 77 MCP tool su agents-api.djungle.io.
